title: Create CMS App Request Schema
description: Schema for the 'Create list + detail pages' CMS-in-CMS wizard (issue #30, Phase 6)

base_name.description: Lowercase keyword base for the generated pages and URLs (e.g. 'team-members').

data_table.description: Name of the existing data table the generated pages bind to. Required unless create_form is true (then the wizard creates a form-owned table).

create_form.description: When true, also scaffold an admin create form page (/cms/<base>/form) with a default input that OWNS a fresh data table; the list/detail pages bind to that table. Default false.

form_field_name.description: Snake_case name of the default form input created with create_form. Default 'title'.

form_field_label.description: Optional translatable label for the default form input. Defaults to a title-cased form_field_name. Ignored when form_fields is provided.

form_fields.description: Multi-field builder (used with create_form): one input per entry is scaffolded into the new form, and the list/detail pages get an editable interpolation block listing every field. Falls back to form_field_name when omitted/empty.

name.description: Snake_case field name (becomes the input name and data table column).

label.description: Optional translatable label. Defaults to a title-cased name.

create_public.description: Create the public list (/<base>) and detail (/<base>/{record_id}) pair. Default true.

create_admin.description: Create the admin CMS list (/cms/<base>) and detail (/cms/<base>/{record_id}) pair. Default true.

record_id_param.description: Snake_case name of the detail route parameter. Default 'record_id'.

list_title.description: Optional heading for the list pages. Defaults to a title-cased base_name.

detail_title.description: Optional heading for the detail pages.

access_groups.description: Optional group ids granted access to the generated pages (in addition to surface defaults).
